story_summary: A single-performer vertical trend short opens with a centered hook, then cycles through four labeled girlfriend archetypes plus a penguin-costume punchline while keeping the same pastel living-room background and locked camera.

source_sampling.notes: Representative frames were inspected across the full 13.445 second runtime to determine scene boundaries and text pattern.

audio_notes: Audio was not separately transcribed. The package preserves a source-audio merge placeholder only.

scenes.summary: The lead faces camera in a white fitted long-sleeve top and black pleated mini skirt while a centered hook reads 'Choose your girlfriend'.

camera.movement: locked camera with only performer sway

scenes.environment: Pastel room corner with soft pink uplight, cream sectional sofa, cream throw blanket, and pale rug.
scenes.transformation_role: hook and baseline look before labeled variants begin

scenes.summary: The same lead switches to a 'Nerdy' look: white blouse, plaid mini skirt, thigh-high stockings, and large glasses.

camera.movement: locked camera with gentle side-to-side sway

on_screen_text: TikTok watermark lower left or lower right depending on frame
scenes.environment: Same sofa, blanket, wall corner, and pink uplight as scene_001.

scenes.summary: The lead appears in a floral cream-and-yellow maxi dress with small hair clips while the label reads 'Girly'.

camera.movement: locked camera with soft arm float and subtle hip sway

scenes.environment: Same locked living-room set and lighting.

scenes.summary: The lead changes into a sporty look with a gray fitted top, black shorts, striped thigh-high socks, and a high ponytail under the label 'Sporty'.

camera.movement: locked camera with slightly brisker bounce and arm pulses

scenes.environment: Same sofa corner, blanket, wall, and pink uplight.

scenes.summary: The final punchline swaps the lead into a penguin costume with hood, beak detail, and yellow mitt accents while the label reads 'Penguin'.

camera.movement: locked camera with playful small arm flaps and gentle bounce

scenes.environment: Same locked living-room set and pink uplight.
